const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"Curtis v. Inslee", court:"ca9", filed_before:"2026-07-19", fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","cluster_id","opinions","panel_names","docketNumber","status","procedural_history"], num_results:3});
if (r?.content) r.content.forEach(c=>c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text ?? c)); else text(r);
